--- create_table_placement_key_minimal.sql
CREATE TABLE t (location_name STRING(MAX) NOT NULL PLACEMENT KEY) PRIMARY KEY ()
--- AST
&ast.CreateTable{
  Rparen:           64,
  PrimaryKeyRparen: 79,
  Name:             &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 13,
        NameEnd: 14,
        Name:    "t",
      },
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.ColumnDef{
    &ast.ColumnDef{
      Null: 46,
      Key:  -1,
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 16,
        NameEnd: 29,
        Name:    "location_name",
      },
      Type: &ast.SizedSchemaType{
        NamePos: 30,
        Rparen:  40,
        Name:    "STRING",
        Max:     true,
      },
      NotNull:      true,
      Hidden:       -1,
      PlacementKey: 61,
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
CREATE TABLE t (
  location_name STRING(MAX) NOT NULL PLACEMENT KEY
) PRIMARY KEY ()
